hero.tagline: Continuously learning, building, and refining web applications with strict quality standards and reliable security.

about.name: Wahyu Fikri
about.bio:
As an Informatics Engineering student and Software Engineer, I have an endless drive to continuously learn and turn ideas into tangible digital solutions.

To me, the success of a project is measured not just by its functionality, but by its security and reliability. Therefore, I always prioritize strong software development standards and meticulous quality testing (QA) to deliver functional, scalable, and high-quality applications.

description: Recorded, sorted, and conducted periodic inspections of warehouse inventory.
Prepared and assembled goods for outgoing distribution
Redesigned the UI/UX of the official website to enhance visual aesthetics and improve user experience.
Troubleshot hardware and software issues to ensure optimal and reliable system performance.
Managed website administration, including updating content and publishing the latest agency information.
